_comment: Copy this file to defaults.local.json (gitignored) and fill in your own values to pre-seed Settings on a fresh install / after a wipe. It is the same JSON shape as the app's settings.json, so you can also just copy your %AppData%\PostXING\settings.json here. Only baked into the build when defaults.local.json exists; a public clone with no such file gets the neutral AppSettings.Default. Leave LocalFolder null - it is per-device (a Windows path is meaningless in the Android APK, and Android uses a SAF content:// URI you pick in-app).
